message:
fix(config): guard against empty project paths and empty language filters

Security fixes:
- Empty project paths would match all projects due to Path::starts_with("")
  returning true. Added guard to skip empty project paths.
- Empty language filter (language: Some("")) would never match, inconsistent
  with language: None. Now treats empty filter as "match all languages".

Added tests:
- test_heredoc_allowlist_empty_project_path_does_not_match
- test_heredoc_allowlist_empty_language_filter_matches_all

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
